subject: Mathematics
question: Que. 20\nIf 5 men or 9 women can finish a piece of work in 19 days, 3 men and 6 women will do the same\nwork in:
explanation: 5 Men = 9 Women $\Rightarrow$ 1 Man = $\frac{9}{5}$ Women. 3 Men + 6 Women = $3(\frac{9}{5}) + 6 = \frac{27}{5} + 6 = \frac{57}{5}$ Women. Using $W_1 D_1 = W_2 D_2$: $9 \times 19 = \frac{57}{5} \times D_2$. $D_2 = \frac{9 \times 19 \times 5}{57} = \frac{9 \times 19 \times 5}{3 \times 19} = \frac{45}{3} = 15$ days.
